cases.title: NewWriter
cases.subtitle: func
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: NewWriter depends on generic io.Writer storage in compressor state, function-valued compression strategy fields, large array-backed state, and byte-slice window mutation.

cases.title: NewWriterDict
cases.subtitle: func
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: NewWriterDict depends on NewWriter plus dictionary writer interface forwarding, copied dictionary state, and compressor window prefill semantics.

cases.title: Reader
cases.subtitle: type
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Reader is an exported interface tied to the unsupported decompressor ReadByte/read path and bufio fallback semantics.

cases.title: Resetter
cases.subtitle: type
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Resetter coverage depends on returned ReadCloser interface values also exposing Reset with io.Reader and dictionary state replacement.

cases.title: Writer
cases.subtitle: type
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Writer behavior depends on the unsupported compressor state model, function-valued strategy fields, io.Writer dispatch, and mutable byte-slice windows.

cases.title: Writer.Close
cases.subtitle: method
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Close depends on compressor final-block emission, huffman bit writer state, io.Writer dispatch, and closed-writer error state.

cases.title: Writer.Flush
cases.subtitle: method
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Flush depends on compressor sync-flush state, huffman bit writer output, and mutation-preserving io.Writer calls.

cases.title: Writer.Reset
cases.subtitle: method
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Reset depends on interface type assertions for dictionary writers, stored io.Writer replacement, and dictionary window refill semantics.

cases.title: Writer.Write
cases.subtitle: method
cases.reason: Audited 2026-06-02: Write depends on compressor byte-window mutation, function-valued compression steps, and io.Writer dispatch for emitted blocks.
